Event: Titanic Excavation - Dec 2024
Event Date: 27/12/2024
Sage Bot Item Code: A117
Forest Ranger's Chevron

Triggers: Duration of the battle

Predator's Triumph
The artifact owner increases all their stats by 10% for each dead enemy and enemies with 50% or less health.

Once in a while, the artifact owner removes all shields and effects that reduce or block damage from the enemy with the highest health. Also, 4 random buffs are removed from the target and the artifact owner deals physical damage equal to 35% of the target's max health.

Requirements: 90-100

User rating: item not rated yet
